steps.title: Identify the infinitive modifier structure
steps.content: The blank must complete an infinitive phrase modifying “films by Indigenous women.” The phrase combines an infinitive-form auxiliary verb with the past participle “featured,” creating a post-nominal modifier that describes the films.

steps.title: Apply the perfect infinitive rule for completed past action
steps.content: Perfect infinitive (to have been) expresses actions completed before the reference time. Since these films have been featured in film festivals in recent years, “to have been featured” correctly conveys this completed action in infinitive form. Options B, C, and D use finite verb forms that cannot function as infinitive modifiers in this position. That matches choice A — A is correct.
